description: Priced $75k under the cost of a new build with the same upgrades! Luxury plank vinyl flooring, open-concept gourmet kitchen with quartz counters, upgraded cabinets, and a 16' atrium glass slider connecting to the great room and backyard. Spacious loft perfect for work or play. Low-maintenance backyard with extended shaded patio and artificial turf. Permanent holiday lighting, gutters, French drains, and Tesla charger included. Barney Farms premier community amenities.
Beautiful 5-bedroom home in Gilbert featuring a resort-style backyard with pool and covered patio. 3-car garage, spacious 3,285 sqft floor plan with den, upstairs landing, and primary suite retreat.

Stunning home in the Madera community featuring an open great room, gourmet kitchen with pantry, formal dining, and a bonus room. Primary suite with walk-in closet and private bathroom. Two guest bedrooms, guest bathroom, and a half bath. Laundry room, backyard retreat, and gorgeous twilight curb appeal. Madera community amenities included.

Spacious 5-bedroom home in the desirable Bella Vista Farms community. Features a sun room, gourmet kitchen with pantry, family room, and a generous primary suite with private bathroom. Guest bedrooms are well-sized with two full guest bathrooms. Single and double garages, laundry room, and a large backyard. Community amenities included.

Stunning Power Ranch home featuring an open kitchen and family room, formal living room, and office/den. The spacious primary suite includes a private bathroom. Three additional guest bedrooms each with their own bathrooms, plus a half bath. Laundry room, beautiful backyard, and gorgeous twilight curb appeal. Drone views showcase the premium lot.

Spacious 5-bedroom home in the sought-after Allen Ranch community. Features a welcoming entry, open living room, formal dining, and a well-appointed kitchen. Upstairs landing leads to the primary suite with walk-in closet and private bathroom, plus four additional guest bedrooms and two guest bathrooms. Laundry room, garage, and beautiful backyard. Allen Ranch amenities include adjacent pickleball courts.

Beautiful 5-bedroom home in Settler's Point featuring an open kitchen and dining area, family room, and inviting living room. Downstairs guest bedroom and bathroom, plus laundry room. Upstairs landing leads to the spacious primary suite with private bathroom and balcony. Three additional guest bedrooms and second guest bathroom complete the upper level. Large backyard, garage, and drone views of the premium lot.

Beautiful 3-bedroom home in Johnson Ranch featuring a living room, open kitchen, and family room. Primary suite with private retreat and bathroom. Two guest bedrooms and shared guest bathroom. Laundry room and a spacious backyard. Johnson Ranch amenities include Indigo Sky, Stardust, and Lakeview Rec Centers, plus The Golf Club at Johnson Ranch.
photos: 16a The Golf Club at Johnson Ranch.jpg

description: Over $170k in premium upgrades including a resort-style pool. 3bd + office/den, 4-car garage. Gourmet kitchen, plank tile flooring, spa-inspired primary suite. 16' atrium door opens to a private pool retreat with cascading waterfall. Barney Farms amenities include aquatic center, fishing/kayaking lakes, pickleball, basketball, and miles of trails.

Priced to sell at $50k under the cost of a new build with the same upgrades! Over $125K in upgrades — Monogram appliances, gas cooktop, Advantium oven, quartz countertops, stacked cabinetry, and a large island. Plank tile flooring throughout, great room fireplace, and a 16' atrium slider for seamless indoor-outdoor living. Spa-inspired primary bath with rain shower. Surround sound prewire, security camera prewire, water softener, and more. Barney Farms community amenities.

Charming 3-bedroom home in The Bridges community featuring an open kitchen, dining area, and family room. Primary bedroom with private bathroom, plus a guest bedroom and shared guest bathroom. Laundry room and a beautiful backyard with stunning twilight curb appeal. Floor plan included. The Bridges amenities are steps away.
Located in the highly sought-after Cooley Station community. Built by Fulton Homes in 2017. Community pool. 2-story home with 6 total rooms including bedrooms plus.

Beautiful 4-bedroom Gilbert home on a 7,351 sqft corner lot with RV gate. Features an open kitchen, dining area, family room, and a spacious primary suite with private bathroom. Three guest bedrooms with two guest bathrooms, laundry room, and a gorgeous backyard with twilight curb appeal. Floor plan included. Drone views showcase the premium corner lot.

Stunning 3-story Power Ranch home with family room, gourmet kitchen, and downstairs bathroom. Second floor landing leads to the primary bedroom and guest bedrooms. Third floor features an additional guest bedroom. Side yard, garage, and laundry room. Full floor plans for all 3 levels included. Virtual twilight exterior and drone views.

This gorgeous home features beautiful mountain views and a totally remodeled kitchen. Move-in ready with vaulted ceilings, 9+ ft flat ceilings, family room, great room, loft, and a den/office. Remodeled kitchen with quartz countertops. Primary suite upstairs with sitting room and walk-in closet. Synthetic grass backyard, covered patio, and 2-car garage. Located in the desirable Foothills community.

Great value in Rancho Mirage, a sought-after 55+ gated community! This updated 3 bed, 2 bath home features all new flooring, baseboards, and fresh interior paint. Sold with furnishings and an EasyGo golf cart — truly turnkey. Enjoy stunning Superstition Mountain views from the covered front porch. Resort-style amenities include tennis, pickleball courts, fitness center, pitching green, dog park, and more.

Beautifully maintained 1,872 sq ft home in desirable 55+ gated McGavin Ranch community, plus a 362 sq ft heated and cooled bonus room! Large lot, fresh interior and exterior paint (2024), new stove and microwave. Full 2-car garage with built-in cabinets, new soft water and RO system, large workshop, and screened porch. Formal dining, family room, and kitchen island. Conveniently located near heated pool, spa, clubhouse, pickleball, shuffleboard, and bocce courts. Seller to pay 2 months lot rent with full price offer!
